## Source: ossf-package-analysis (221b3fbda6780c082532d35d4b0ce79ea245c161c259ec2d4e3f741df68efe52)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-octoshift-imports' @ 2.7.1 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
